rows.closure_requirement: Closure basis, evidence, and audit refs stay attached to the error.
closure_requirements: Dominant remediation owner and object-backed next path unless system-owned automatic retry remains lawful.
Closure basis, evidence, and audit refs stay attached to the error.
notes: Accepted-risk refs only under resolution_state = ACCEPTED_RISK.
rows.owner_requirement: Dominant remediation owner and object-backed next path unless system-owned automatic retry remains lawful.

rows.retention_boundary: Owner and closure rules persist as typed lifecycle basis until the lineage is terminal and archived.

rows.closure_requirement: Closure must declare error_resolution_effect and evidence refs.
closure_requirements: Explicit owner type and owner ref unless the task is system-owned.

notes: Task completion cannot silently close the source error.

rows.closure_requirement: No log-only reconstruction or note-derived next action.
closure_requirements: Projects the active owner from persisted lifecycle objects only.

notes: Keeps risk, compensation, and investigation branches visible without substituting them for the root lineage.
